name: Chewy Gooeys
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 13x9 inches pan.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
3. Blend the cake mix, margarine, 1/3 cup evaporated milk, and pecans until moistened.
4. Press half of the dough into the bottom of the pan.
5. Bake for 6-8 minutes.
6. Melt caramels and the remaining evaporated milk in a double boiler.
7. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the top of the baked cake mix.
8. Spread the melted caramel mixture over the chocolate chips.
9. Take small pieces of the remaining dough and pat them flat between your hands.
10. Lay these flat pieces over the caramel layer (caramel will not be completely covered).
11. Bake for 15-18 minutes.
12. Cool and cut.
